title: The School of Planning and Architecture Act, 2014
full_text: The School of Planning and Architecture Act, 2014 योजना और वास्तुकला विद्यालय अधिनियम, 2014 Rules Regulations Notifications Orders Circulars Ordinance Statutes SectionsScheduleAnnexureAppendixFormsActdetails Act ID: 201437 Act Number: 37 Enactment Date: 2014-12-18 Act Year: 2014 Short Title: The School of Planning and Architecture Act, 2014 Hindi Title: योजना और वास्तुकला विद्यालय अधिनियम, 2014 Long Title: An Act to establish and declare Schools of Planning and Architecture as Institutions of national importance in order to promote education and research in architectural studies including planning of human settlements. Ministry: Ministry of Education Department: Department of Higher Education Enforcement Date: 22-01-2015 Notification: 22nd January, 2015, vide notification No. S.O. 212(E), dated 22nd January, 2015, see Gazette of India, Extraordinary, Part II, sec. 3(ii). Schedule 1. THE SCHEDULE Order Appendix Forms TitleFiles TitleFiles TitleFiles Show all section The School of Planning and Architecture Act, 2014 CHAPTER I PRELIMINARY CHAPTER II THE SCHOOL CHAPTER III THE AUTHORITIES OF SCHOOLS CHAPTER IV ACCOUNTS AND AUDIT CHAPTER V THE COUNCIL CHAPTER VI MISCELLANEOUS Section 1. Short title and commencement. Section 2. Declaration of certain Schools as Institutions of national importance. Section 3. Definitions. Section 4. Establishment and incorporation of Schools. Section 5. Objects of School. Section 6. Effects of incorporation of Schools. Section 7. Powers and functions of Schools. Section 8. Schools to be open to all races, creeds and classes. Section 9. Teaching at Schools. Section 10. School to be a distinct legal entity not-for-profit. Section 11. Visitor. Section 12. Authorities of Schools. Section 13. Board of Governors. Section 14. Term of office of vacancies among, and allowances payable to, Members of Board. Section 15. Powers and functions of Board. Section 16. Senate. Section 17. Functions of Senate. Section 18. Chairperson of Board. Section 19. Director. Section 20. Registrar. Section 21. Other authorities and officers. Section 22. Review of performance of School. Section 23. Grants by Central Government. Section 24. Fund of School. Section 25. Accounts and audit. Section 26. Pension and provident fund. Section 27. Appointments. Section 28. Statutes. Section 29. Statutes how made. Section 30. Ordinances. Section 31. Ordinances how made. Section 32. Tribunal of Arbitration. Section 33. Establishment of Council for Schools. Section 34. Term of office of vacancies among, and allowances payable to, Members of Council. Section 35. Functions of Council. Section 36. Chairperson of Council. Section 37. Power to make rules in respect of matters in this Chapter. Show Related Subordinates Section 38. Acts and proceedings not to be invalidated by vacancies, etc. Section 39. Returns and information to be provided to Central Government. Section 40. Power to remove difficulties. Section 41. School to be public authority under Right to Information, Act, 2005. Section 42. Transitional provisions. Schedule 1.
